deals.Description: An AI-only financial newsroom that trains specialized AI models to extract news and data from financial press releases and regulatory filings, delivering it with zero latency to professional investors and analysts. It covers 9,000 companies from the US, Canada, and Europe.
An AI-powered newsroom system for financial news, developed by an ex-Reuters team.
Develops an AI-only financial newsroom for real-time market intelligence. The platform extracts structured data and news signals from financial press releases and regulatory filings.
Develops an AI-driven platform to analyze and manage customer feedback. The company is scaling its operations to expand its reach and capabilities.
Copenhagen-based company building AI infrastructure for compliance in financial services, automating tasks like risk assessments and data interpretation for banks and fintechs.
deals.Founders: Mikkel Skarnager, Ciprian Florescu, Jan-Erik Wagner, Jeremy Joly

deals.Description: Copenhagen-based startup building trust infrastructure for knowledge validation in the AI era, using transparent systems and collective intelligence to evaluate statements.
deals.Investors: 20VC, ByFounders, 20Growth, angels from Stack Overflow, GitHub, Reddit, Meta, Kahoot, HubSpot, Encord
